problems_encountered.description: HTTP 403 error when attempting to list conversations. API returned 'Unexpected response status (expected 200, got: 403)'

tool_response_summary: List operation failed with 403 Forbidden error. The authenticated user may lack permissions to access conversations.
execution_notes: Tool executed in 31ms. Received permission denied error. This endpoint may require elevated privileges or the feature may not be available for this account type.
